title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. nudissimum
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. nudissimum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. nudissimum include treating urinary tract infections, reducing fever, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
